case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. HAIATE MARTINEK

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
